name: Mexican Salad Bowl
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the mixed greens thoroughly.
2. Chop the green onion tops into small pieces.
3. Slice the green pepper into thin strips.
4. Remove pits from olives and slice them thinly.
5. Dice the tomatoes into wedge-shaped pieces.
6. Combine all ingredients in a large salad bowl and toss gently to mix.
